articles.title: Is Elon Musk working on this new Dogecoin use-case?
articles.description: Dogecoin was a joke-coin, a cryptocurrency that originated from a meme, which gained mainstream attention thanks to Tesla CEO Elon Musk. articles.description: MATIC, EOS, XMR and AAVE could rally higher over the coming days if Bitcoin price can sustain within the $30,000 to $33,000 support zone.

articles.title: Volatility Paves Way for USDC Presence on Balance Sheets
articles.description: The volatile nature of crypto market front-runners like bitcoin (BTC) could lead to their replacement on company balance sheets.

articles.title: Polygon ($MATIC) Data Now Searchable With Help of Google Cloud’s Big Query
articles.description: The Etheruem layer-two scaling solution Polygon (MATIC) has announced its blockchain datasets have been integrated on Google Cloud, allowing developers, data analysts, and crypto enthusiasts to better understand the Polygon blockchain. With support from Google’s BigQuery, a “serverless, highly scalable, and cost-effective multicloud data warehouse designed for business agility,” Polygon’s...

articles.title: Trustless XMR-BTC Swaps Launch on Monero’s Mainnet
articles.description: COMIT Network has released a beta version of their XMR-BTC swap tool on Monero’s mainnet.

articles.title: ‘I felt like a moron’ for not buying Bitcoin, says billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller
articles.description: Billionaire investor Stanley Druckenmiller has recently explained why invested only $20 million in Bitcoin (BTC), skeptical of Ethereum (ETH), and prefers to pretend that Dogecoin (DOGE) doesn’t exist at all.

articles.title: Dogecoin: American Cafe Convenience Store Chain To Start Accepting $DOGE This Summer
articles.description: A major restaurant and convenience store chain in the United States, has announced it will start accepting Dogecoin ($DOGE) and select other cryptoassets as means of payment via a partnership with crypto payment processor Flexa. articles.title: If you don't have 2FA on your #Binance account we can't be friends.
Ripple Reiterates Its Intention To Be Carbon-Neutral by 2030
articles.description: Ripple has reiterated its commitment to become carbon net-zero by 2030 as part of an effort to avert worst-case climate change scenarios in a move similar to one made by most countries throughout the world, which have committed to the same goal but by 2050.
